title: AS 4100:2020 Lifting Lug Design
description: Design steel lifting lugs in accordance with AS 4100:2020.

s3d_section.description: Section ID. Symbol: Section. Section object imported from S3D model.

tp.description: Lug Thickness (tp). Symbol: t_{p}. Units: mm

h.description: Distance to hole center (h). Symbol: h. Units: mm. Distance between base of lug plate to center of hole.

d1.description: OD of Contact Area (d1). Symbol: d_{1}. Units: mm. Outside diameter of contact area.

dh.description: Hole Diameter (dh). Symbol: d_{h}. Units: mm

dp.description: Pin Diameter (dp). Symbol: d_{p}. Units: mm. Diameter of pin placed in the lug hole.

Lp.description: Pin Length (Lp). Symbol: L_{p}. Units: mm. Length of pin placed in the lug hole.

tw.description: Weld Size (tw). Symbol: t_{w}. Units: mm. Equal leg fillet weld considered in design.

theta.description: Lifting Angle (ϴ). Symbol: ϴ. Units: °. Lifting angle with horizontal.

fy.description: Yield Stress - Lug Plate (fy). Symbol: f_{y}. Units: MPa

fu.description: Tensile Stress - Lug Plate (fu). Symbol: f_{u}. Units: MPa

fyp.description: Yield Stress - Pin (fyp). Symbol: f_{yp}. Units: MPa

fuw.description: Weld Ultimate Stress (Fuw). Symbol: f_{uw}. Units: MPa. As per AS4100 Table 9.7.3.10 (1).

kt.description: Correction factor (kt). Symbol: k_{t}. As per AS4100 Table 7.3.2.

DAF.description: Dynamic Amplification Factor (DAF). Symbol: DAF. As per AS1418 or project design basis.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
